li.p: The function is quadratic, so the domain is {\left(-\infty ,\infty \right)}\text{.} There are no invalid inputs for this function.

Since the formula is in vertex form, we can see that the graph of f has a vertex at {\left(1.33333,0.571429\right)}\text{.} Since the leading coefficient is 4 which is positive, the parabola opens upward. So the range is all numbers greater than or equal to {{\frac{4}{7}}}\text{.} So the range is {\left[0.571429,\infty \right)}\text{.}
